text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ardan has made a full recovery after her
stay at the rest house, where she asks whether I'm
really prepared to forge ahead with a racer who's
as fragile as glass—liable to break at any moment.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
To demonstrate my resolve as her trainer to
ensure she's never pushed to breaking point, I
show her the road map I've planned out for her
future.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ardan accepts both my answer and my
decision to stand by her as her trainer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After sharing our intentions with the Mejiro
family's chief physician and gaining his permission
to return to the academy, Mejiro Ardan and I get
back on track.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ardan delegates all decision-making
regarding training and races during her junior
year to me. And with that, our journey begins
anew!
